LanguageData.QualityBuilderCommand.Label: Quality Builder
LanguageData.QualityBuilderOn.Label: Set Quality Builderer
LanguageData.QualityBuilderOn.Desc: Current quality: {0}. Set buildings for skillful workers
LanguageData.QualityBuilderOff.Label: Unset Quality Builder
LanguageData.QualityBuilderOff.Desc: Current quality: {0}. Unset buildings for skillful workers
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.SelectedSettingsHint: Click to switch between these default settings and settings specific to the current map
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.MinSkill: Quality builds require construction skill {0} (best builder: {1})
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.MinSkillDiff: Allow builders up to {0} skill levels below the best builder
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.UseMapSettings: Use these map settings (off = use default settings)
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.MaxRebuildAttempts: Give up after {0} failed rebuild attempts (∞ = never give up)
LanguageData.QualityBuilder.RebuildGaveUp: QualityBuilder gave up on {0} after {1} rebuild attempts (last quality: {2}). The building was kept. You can change this limit in the mod settings.
